title: Renaissance Golden Age Oil Painting Food Still Life
sourceTitle: Renaissance Golden Age Oil Painting Food Still Life AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Dutch Golden Age or Italian Renaissance oil-painting food still life of a steaming bowl of black-garlic truffle ramen with glossy noodles, marbled egg, and lacquered pork, presented as MIDNIGHT TRUFFLE RAMEN with ornate ingredient labeling and museum-grade drama. Subject: a steaming bowl of black-garlic truffle ramen with glossy noodles, marbled egg, and lacquered pork sits front and center as the craveable hero dish, surrounded by ingredients labeled through Nori feuille marine, Ajitama oeuf d or, Porc laque royal, Ciboule verte. Scene: dark velvet table with scattered herbs, antique cutlery, and a rough stone edge supports the dish with dark velvet or stone, rustic bread, fresh herbs, jewel-bright vegetables, translucent sauces, and baroque still-life abundance. Composition: Centered hero dish with ingredients arranged in a rich circular baroque composition; gilded ornate typography at the top reads MIDNIGHT TRUFFLE RAMEN, and the subtitle reads A feast lit by shadow and gold. Signature Elements: Preserved renaissance golden age oil painting food still life source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Caravaggio meets Rembrandt food painting: hyperrealistic oil texture, dramatic chiaroscuro, copperplate gold cartouches, extraordinary museum finish, and intensely craveable food photography detail. Color Palette: Deep umbers, black velvet shadows, gilded gold typography, jewel-tone greens and reds, glossy sauce highlights, warm bread browns, and luminous cream accents. Lighting: One strong upper-left light source reveals glistening proteins, translucent sauces, rustic textures, carved shadows, and museum-gallery depth. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Renaissance Golden Age Oil Painting Food Still Life Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Dutch Golden Age or Italian Renaissance oil-painting food still life of a golden roast chicken with lemon glaze, crisp skin, roasted garlic, and jeweled root vegetables, presented as GILDED LEMON ROAST with ornate ingredient labeling and museum-grade drama. Subject: a golden roast chicken with lemon glaze, crisp skin, roasted garlic, and jeweled root vegetables sits front and center as the craveable hero dish, surrounded by ingredients labeled through Citron royal, Ail confit, Thym sauvage, Carotte rubis. Scene: old stone slab with folded burgundy cloth, rustic bread, and silver serving tools supports the dish with dark velvet or stone, rustic bread, fresh herbs, jewel-bright vegetables, translucent sauces, and baroque still-life abundance. Composition: Centered hero dish with ingredients arranged in a rich circular baroque composition; gilded ornate typography at the top reads GILDED LEMON ROAST, and the subtitle reads A banquet of fire, citrus, and velvet shadow. Signature Elements: Preserved renaissance golden age oil painting food still life source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Caravaggio meets Rembrandt food painting: hyperrealistic oil texture, dramatic chiaroscuro, copperplate gold cartouches, extraordinary museum finish, and intensely craveable food photography detail. Color Palette: Deep umbers, black velvet shadows, gilded gold typography, jewel-tone greens and reds, glossy sauce highlights, warm bread browns, and luminous cream accents. Lighting: One strong upper-left light source reveals glistening proteins, translucent sauces, rustic textures, carved shadows, and museum-gallery depth. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
